description: Born of dragons, dragonborn walk proudly through a world that greets them with fearful incomprehension.

trait.Darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

trait.Draconic Ancestry.description: Choose a dragon type: Black (Acid), Blue (Lightning), Brass (Fire), Bronze (Lightning), Copper (Acid), Gold (Fire), Green (Poison), Red (Fire), Silver (Cold), White (Cold). This determines your Breath Weapon damage type and Damage Resistance.

trait.Damage Resistance.description: You have resistance to the damage type determined by your Draconic Ancestry.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Draconic.
